## Proposed API

```typescript
// JavaScript
import { myNewFunction } from '@urdu-tools/core'
myNewFunction('اردو متن')  // → expected output
```

```csharp
// C#
UrduTools.Core.MyModule.MyNewFunction("اردو متن");  // → expected output
```

## Example inputs and expected outputs

| Input | Expected output | Notes |
|-------|----------------|-------|
| `'...'` | `'...'` | |

## Does this need to be in both JS and C#?

- [ ] Yes — both packages
- [ ] No — JS only (e.g. browser/encoding specific)
- [ ] No — C# only
